purpose: Route agents-stack harness requests to the correct workflow phase, then dispatch that child as a fresh worker instead of doing the phase inline in the orchestrator.
selection_order: Initialize missing or unusable live state before any sprint routing.
If compound_pending_feature_ids is non-empty, drain it with compound-capture before resuming or opening sprint work.
If one runnable active sprint exists, resume it from the strongest durable artifact before proposing new work.
Parked `awaiting_human` and `escalated_to_human` sprints remain visible but do not count as the runnable active sprint.
When no runnable active sprint exists, pick the highest-priority dependency-ready `needs_brainstorm` backlog item before considering `pending` proposal work.
When review or contradictory state is not yet reconciled, prefer state-update over new execution.
Route `build_failed` and reconciled `review_failed` retries to generator-execution only when attempts remain and `clean_restore_ref` names a safe restore boundary.
Choose the narrowest phase child that matches the current artifact gate.
After selecting a child, dispatch a fresh worker, sub-agent, Task agent, or equivalent runtime delegate with phase-scoped tools and explicit artifact targets.
Do not load the child prompt into the orchestrator context and continue inline.

children.name: project-initializer
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh initializer worker to bootstrap durable live and reference state when the repository cannot yet support honest routing.
route_when: `docs/live/features.json` is missing, empty, unparsable, or lacks durable backlog truth.
The repository follows the agents-stack layout but has no trustworthy live state for selecting or resuming work.
avoid_when: A runnable active sprint already exists and should be resumed instead.
Durable live state already names pending, brainstorm, compound, parked, or active work truthfully.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: generator-brainstorm
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh brainstorm worker to deepen a dependency-ready `needs_brainstorm` backlog item in `docs/live/ideas.md` and, when justified, promote it into proposal-ready backlog state without claiming the runnable sprint slot.
route_when: No runnable active sprint exists, `compound_pending_feature_ids` is empty, and the highest-priority dependency-ready backlog item is `needs_brainstorm`.
An idea needs exploration or framing before a truthful sprint proposal can be written.
The brainstorm result should update `docs/live/ideas.md` and may promote the same feature into `pending` in `docs/live/features.json`.
avoid_when: A runnable active sprint exists and should be resumed instead.
Compound work is queued and must be drained first.
The candidate backlog item is already `pending`, `proposed`, or later.
The brainstorm would need to claim `runnable_active_sprint_id` or open a sprint workspace directly.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: generator-proposal
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh proposal worker to turn the highest-priority dependency-ready pending backlog item into the next bounded sprint proposal when no approved contract exists yet.
route_when: No runnable active sprint exists, `compound_pending_feature_ids` is empty, and no dependency-ready `needs_brainstorm` item outranks the pending proposal lane.
The highest-priority dependency-ready `pending` backlog item should become the next sprint proposal.
Live state is trustworthy, but the selected feature has no local sprint proposal or the proposal was explicitly reset.
avoid_when: A runnable active sprint already exists.
A dependency-ready `needs_brainstorm` item should be explored first.
The candidate backlog item still has unsatisfied dependencies.
`sprint_proposal.md` already exists and still needs contract review.
`contract.md`, `handoff.md`, or `review.md` already exists for the runnable active sprint.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: evaluator-contract-review
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh contract-review worker to independently approve or reject a sprint proposal before any implementation begins.
route_when: `.harness/<feature>/sprint_proposal.md` exists without an approved `contract.md`.
`status.json.resume_from` points to `sprint_proposal.md` after an interrupted proposal-review pass.
avoid_when: No proposal exists yet.
`contract.md`, `handoff.md`, or `review.md` already represents a later phase.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: generator-execution
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh execution worker to implement the approved contract, retry a reconciled `build_failed` sprint, or retry a reconciled `review_failed` sprint when attempts remain.
route_when: `.harness/<feature>/contract.md` exists and no later handoff or review gate is waiting.
`status.json.phase` is `contracted`, `executing`, `build_failed`, or `review_failed` and the stronger local files agree.

A prior `review_failed` has already been reconciled into local and live state, or a prior `build_failed` has already recorded truthful retry metadata, `attempt_count` is still below `max_attempts`, and `clean_restore_ref` names a safe restore boundary for a fresh worker.
Build or startup triage failed inside execution, so the same execution lane owns the next attempt without paying for live review.
avoid_when: The proposal is not approved yet.
`handoff.md` exists and independent review has not happened yet.
`review.md` exists but local and live state do not yet agree on the outcome.
`attempt_count` has reached `max_attempts`, `clean_restore_ref` is missing or unsafe, or recovery requires a human decision before another retry.
The sprint is explicitly parked in `awaiting_human` or `escalated_to_human`.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: adversarial-live-review
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh review worker to run the independent PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED review only after execution produced a truthful handoff and passed build/startup triage.
route_when: `handoff.md` and `runtime.md` exist and the work is ready for independent review.
`status.json` points to `handoff.md` or indicates `awaiting_review`.
avoid_when: The contract is missing.
Implementation is still blocked or has not produced a truthful handoff.
`status.json.phase` is `build_failed`, `awaiting_human`, or `escalated_to_human`.
`review.md` already exists and has not been reconciled.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: state-update
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh state-update worker to reconcile review outcomes, blocker publication, retry eligibility, parked human gates, archive history, and compound queue publication into durable live truth.
route_when: `review.md` exists and the outcome has not yet been reconciled into local and live state.
A PASS must be archived and queued into `compound_pending_feature_ids`, a FAIL must be reopened truthfully, or a BLOCKED verdict must be published into `awaiting_human` or `escalated_to_human`.
`status.json.phase` is `build_failed` or `review_failed` but automatic retry cannot proceed yet because reconciliation, attempt budgeting, or clean-restore decisions are still missing.
Local and live state contradict each other, or active and parked sprint semantics are not yet reflected truthfully.
avoid_when: No review, retry-gating issue, or contradiction exists and an earlier phase still owns the sprint.
The repository is merely uninitialized and needs bootstrap, not reconciliation.
The sprint is already parked in `awaiting_human` or `escalated_to_human`, that parked state is fully reflected in local and live files, and no new human edits have changed the checkpoint.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.

children.name: compound-capture
children.summary: Dispatches a fresh compound worker to capture durable learnings after state publication, update `docs/live/memory.md` and optional reference docs, and clear `compound_pending_feature_ids`.
route_when: `docs/live/features.json` contains one or more ids in `compound_pending_feature_ids`.
A PASS result has already been published and archived, but durable learning capture has not yet been completed.
The next truthful action is to update `docs/live/memory.md` and any reference docs before opening or resuming sprint work.
avoid_when: The queue is empty.
The router would need to reopen or claim a runnable sprint to do the compound work.
Review reconciliation has not happened yet and `state-update` still owns the truth publication.

install_if_missing.notes: Install the nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically, then dispatch it as a fresh worker.
